recommendations.title: Omen IV: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: Damien Thorn is dead, but his prophecy is reborn in a mysterious girl named Delia, who is adopted by two attorneys.

recommendations.title: Greater
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story of the greatest walk-on in the history of college football.

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: Dear Santa
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Romance, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

recommendations.title: Suzanne
recommendations.overview: The story of a family and a love affair told through the journey of a young woman called Suzanne.

recommendations.title: Oh, Ramona!
recommendations.overview: Oh, Ramona! seeks the transformation of Andrew from a teenager into an adult who lives candidly and selflessly his first love story, innocent and uninvolved, alternating with the second, intense and insane story, incapable of making a choice.

recommendations.title: Ghislain Lambert's Bicycle
recommendations.overview: In the 70s, there was Merckx and there were the others. Ghislain Lambert was one of the others. This is his story, a quite simple one. The story of a modest Belgian bike racer. His greatest ambition in life? To become a champion. His greatest tragedy

recommendations.title: Once Upon My Mother
recommendations.overview: In 1963, Esther gives birth to Roland, the youngest of a large family. Roland is born with a club foot that prevents him from standing. Against everyone's advice, she promises her son that he will walk like the others and that he will have a fabulous

recommendations.title: Dangal
recommendations.overview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.

recommendations.title: The Book of Wonders
recommendations.overview: This is the crazy bet of a mother ready to do anything to help her 12-year-old son, Louis, wake up from his coma. After Louis' accident, Thelma decides to do for him the "10 things to do before the end of the world" that he had written in his diary.
